message:
feat(safe_mode): replace placeholder trust re-verification with ledger-backed deterministic checks

- Real parse_duration_between() using chrono RFC-3339 parsing (was returning Some(0))
- Real verify_trust_state() with structured TrustVerificationInput, SHA-256 evidence
  digest computation, ct_eq hash comparison, staleness detection, anomaly classification
- New types: AnomalyClassification, DegradedDisposition, TrustVerificationInput
- Updated SafeModeEntryReceipt with anomalies, disposition, trust_proof_digest fields
- compute_trust_proof_digest() and compute_evidence_digest() helpers
- SMO-006 trust re-verification and SMO-007 exit clearance event codes
- 110 tests pass, clippy clean

Closes: bd-3ly7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
